full_text:
Chen Ying 陳應
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Ying (陳應). Officer of Zhao Fan. Fought with Zhao Yun, but was later executed by him. Chen Ying is a fictional character. Chen Ying was affiliated with Zhao Fan. Chen Ying lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
